name: @grip/cli
description: Grip unified CLI — configure MCP, launch Chrome, run servers

scripts.build:bin: npx pkg --targets node18-macos-arm64 --output bin/grip-macos-arm64 dist/index.cjs && npx pkg --targets node18-macos-x64 --output bin/grip-macos-x64 dist/index.cjs && npx pkg --targets node18-linux-x64 --output bin/grip-linux-x64 dist/index.cjs && npx pkg --targets node18-win-x64 --output bin/grip-win-x64.exe dist/index.cjs
